description:
🕒 18:30–20:30

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Ecotourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-cyokotto-lighttrap/

Explore the forest at night with a specialist guide who will help you spot creatures active after dark.

【Fee】¥2,500 per person, ¥2,000 for repeat visitors, ¥5,000 per family (includes insurance and guide)

【Capacity】20 people

【Guide】Tsubasa Kojima (Hanno Ecotourism Citizen Guide Association, Wildlife Division)

【What to bring】Flashlight (headlamp recommended), drinking water, rain gear, backpack or similar (something that keeps both hands free is best), towel, insect repellent spray, long sleeves and long pants, well-fitting non-slip sports shoes, hat
location: 集合 飯能市中央公園トイレ前（国際興業バス「OH!!!・天覧山下」下車徒歩1分）
summary: Quick Easy Tour – Night Creature Spotting and Light Trapping
